title: Display assigned sub-items in "My Week" view

posts.author: Mark1 (Mark Gustavsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Community, I am really enjoying the new sub-items feature - so much so that I am using it a lot for tasks which I want to assign to me team!

My pain point with the new sub-items feature is that the assigned sub-items do not appear in the “My Week” view after they are assigned. This means that I can assign entire workloads to team members through sub-items however these work items do not appear in their 'My Week" views. Does anyone else use sub-items to assign tasks to team members?

I would love to see this feature introduced into Monday.com!
